历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 5302 → 5107 → 9678 → 10308 → 16934, showing a continuous backward trend overall, with a cumulative backward shift of about 11,800 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 16934, a significant backward shift of 6626 places compared to 2024, indicating intensified competition; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 8 in 2021, 7 in 2022, 8 in 2023, 8 in 2024, and 7 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 6, a reduction of 1 (-14.3%) compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition but to a limited extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 79th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, stable in the 73–82 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities; reputation was slightly negative in 2023 (weakened appeal of minor language majors), and slightly negative in 2026 (involving academic misconduct/teacher ethics incidents); Douyin popularity ranked 39th (relatively hot), with comprehensive popularity of about 1.17 million; there was a low-attention abnormal admission signal in 2023. The slightly negative reputation may somewhat suppress application enthusiasm; Foreign Language and Literature is A+ (top nationally), the core ace discipline of the university, strongly attractive to language-oriented candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text:
Foreign language majors had a social popularity assessment of 'generally wait-and-see' in 2024, with low popularity; the number of Physics Category candidates in the province was approximately 363,040 in 2025, estimated at about 364,843 in 2026, a slight increase; Beijing Foreign Studies University is located in Beijing, not a local university in Hebei Province, with no local admission preference; the university enrolls a small number of students in Hebei Province (Physics Category consistently 6–8 people), so regional preference has no significant impact.
8. [Prediction Conclusion] Considering the significant backward trend in 2025 rankings, the slight increase in Physics Category candidates in 2026, and the slightly negative reputation, although the 1-person enrollment reduction in 2026 slightly eases competition, the overall intensifying trend remains unchanged; combined with the increase in candidates and the slight upward revision due to reputation suppression, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 15,532, with a range of 15,032–16,032.
